---
name: Research Question
about: Frame an unresolved research question that blocks design or implementation.
title: "[Research] "
labels: [research]
assignees: []
---

## Question

State the research question in one sentence.

## Why it matters

What design, governance, or implementation work depends on answering this?

## Current hypothesis

What is the current best guess, if any?

## Existing context

What relevant repo documents, prior discussions, or external precedents already exist?

## Evidence needed

What kinds of analysis, examples, simulations, or comparisons would move this forward?

## Decision pressure

What is blocked until this is answered?

## Output expectation

What should a good answer produce: a memo, decision recommendation, model, schema, or prototype?
